sentences.arabic: حِمَايَةُ الْخُصُوصِيَّةِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ أَمْرٌ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Zaštita lične privatnosti na internetu je veoma važna stvar.
sentences.translationEn: Protecting personal privacy on the internet is a very important matter.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَنْبَغِي لَكَ مُشَارَكَةُ كَلِمَاتِ السِّرِّ أَوْ مَعْلُومَاتِكَ الْخَاصَّةِ مَعَ الْغُرَبَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ne biste trebali dijeliti svoje lozinke ili privatne informacije sa strancima.
sentences.translationEn: You should not share your passwords or private information with strangers.

sentences.arabic: تُوَفِّرُ مَوَاقِعُ كَثِيرَةٌ إِعْدَادَاتِ الْأَمَانِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى بَيَانَاتِكَ.
sentences.translation: Mnoge stranice pružaju sigurnosne postavke za očuvanje vaših podataka.
sentences.translationEn: Many sites provide security settings to keep your data safe.

sentences.arabic: كُنْ حَذِرًا دَائِمًا عِنْدَمَا تَتَصَفَّحُ مَوَاقِعَ غَيْرَ مَعْرُوفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Budite uvijek oprezni kada pregledate nepoznate stranice.
sentences.translationEn: Always be careful when browsing unknown websites.
